title: chromolaena steyermarkiana
intro: Chromolaena steyermarkiana, also known as the Mexican mint plant, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chromolaena steyermarkiana include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce cholesterol. Chromolaena steyermarkiana is often prepared for herbal use by drying the leaves and flowers, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
